items.title: The best config in your bake-off didn't win. Selection did.
items.description: Best-of-K eval selection bias: pick the highest-scoring config from K candidates on one eval set and that observed score is biased up. It reports the expected maximum of K noisy estimates, which beats the field mean whenever K exceeds one. The bias appears even when all K configs are truly equal,

items.title: Stop manually curling port 9600: Using MCP to triage Logstash bottlenecks
items.description:
I have a ritual. Whenever a pipeline latency alert hits my phone, my first instinct isn't to open a heavy dashboard or spin up a full Grafana instance. I grab my terminal and start firing curl commands at port 9600.

curl -s localhost:9600/_node/stats?pretty...
